title: Urban Vivah Wedding Expo in Vadodara – March 29, 2026
body: Urban Vivah – Summer Glam Expo arrives at Lemon Tree Hotel, Vadodara on March 29. Plan your wedding water supply before peak season slots fill up.
metaDescription: Urban Vivah – Summer Glam Expo at Lemon Tree Hotel, Vadodara on March 29, 2026. Plan bulk packaged drinking water for your wedding from Anjani Water Vadodara.
keywords: Urban Vivah Vadodara, wedding expo Vadodara 2026, bulk water for wedding Vadodara, wedding water supply Vadodara, Lemon Tree Hotel Vadodara event
content:
Urban Vivah – Summer Glam Expo is coming to Vadodara on Sunday, March 29, 2026, at Lemon Tree Hotel. Starting at 10:00 AM, this lifestyle and wedding exhibition brings together bridal wear designers, venue stylists, photographers, caterers, decorators, and event planners under one roof. For couples and families in the middle of wedding planning, it is one of the most convenient events of the season to compare vendors, collect quotes, and lock in bookings.

The timing could not be more apt. March through May is peak wedding season in Gujarat, with auspicious dates filling up fast across Vadodara's party plots and banquet halls. Thousands of families are currently in the planning phase, juggling vendor meetings, guest lists, and logistics. The Urban Vivah Expo offers a curated shortcut — most of the decisions that typically take weeks of separate appointments can be explored in a single Sunday morning.

One element that often gets finalised last is the water supply — yet it affects every single function, from the mehndi and haldi ceremonies to the main reception dinner and the baraat procession. Anjani Water provides bulk packaged drinking water for weddings across Vadodara, supplying Anjani Premium 200ml sealed bottles, Bisleri, and Bailley in any quantity required. We handle multi-day delivery schedules, last-minute top-ups, and coordination with your catering team so that guests always have access to clean, chilled water.

If you are visiting the Urban Vivah Expo to finalise your wedding plans, use this as a reminder to sort your water supply early. Wedding season slots are booking out quickly. Contact Anjani Water today to reserve your delivery dates — we'll make sure one important item is completely off your checklist before your big day.

title: Vadodara's Hottest Summer in 5 Years – Are You Prepared?
body: Temperatures in Vadodara are hitting 42°C by late March 2026 — the earliest heat peak in five years. Stock up on bulk water now for homes, offices and events.
metaDescription: Vadodara is facing its hottest summer in 5 years with temperatures crossing 42°C in March 2026. Anjani Water provides bulk packaged drinking water delivery across Vadodara for homes, offices and events.
keywords: Vadodara summer 2026, bulk water delivery Vadodara, summer hydration Vadodara, packaged drinking water Vadodara, water bottles for events
content:
Vadodara is recording temperatures of 42°C as early as the last week of March 2026 — a full three weeks ahead of the usual summer peak. The India Meteorological Department's Vadodara station has flagged this as the earliest and most intense pre-summer heat surge in five years, with forecasts pointing to peak temperatures of 45–47°C through April and May.

For residents, businesses, and event planners across the city, this early onset makes proactive hydration planning essential. Doctors at SSG Hospital and several local clinics have already reported a rise in heat-exhaustion cases, particularly among outdoor workers, delivery personnel, and schoolchildren. Health experts recommend at least 3–4 litres of water per person per day during these conditions — clean, sealed, and safe.

Anjani Water has increased its summer stock capacity to meet the surge in demand from across Vadodara. Our 200ml sealed bottles — available in Anjani Premium (our in-house BIS-certified brand), Bisleri, and Bailley — are dispatched fresh and stored under proper conditions before delivery. Whether you need a daily home supply, weekly office replenishment, or a bulk consignment for a wedding or corporate event, our team is equipped for same-day and scheduled delivery across Alkapuri, Gotri, Subhanpura, Sama, Manjalpur, Waghodia Road, and surrounding areas.

Don't wait for the peak of summer to sort out your water supply. Set up a regular delivery schedule with Anjani Water today and ensure your family, employees, and guests stay properly hydrated throughout Vadodara's most intense summer in recent memory. Contact us on WhatsApp or phone for a quick quote and same-day setup.
